heading: Boyup Brook vs Brabham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boyup Brook, Western Australia and Brabham, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boyup Brook and Brabham have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Boyup Brook or Brabham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boyup Brook has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Brabham scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boyup Brook scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Brabham scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boyup Brook or Brabham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boyup Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
